# Metechi
> Metechi builds polished mobile products including CoachPad and Infinite Flux.

Canonical: https://www.metechi.dev/
Contact: info@metechi.dev
Last updated: 2026-06-25

## Core Pages
- [Metechi - Premium Mobile Products](https://www.metechi.dev/) - Public homepage for Metechi products.
- [CoachPad - Futuristic Tactical Board for Coaches](https://www.metechi.dev/coachpad.html) - Tactical board app for coaches to create drills, animate formations, and share tactical plans.
- [Infinite Flux - Mobile Reflex Runner](https://www.metechi.dev/infinite-flux.html) - Reflex runner game built around lane switching, timing, focus energy, streaks, and upgrades.
- [Metechi Privacy Policy](https://www.metechi.dev/privacy.html) - Website privacy overview and product privacy links.

## Product Summary
- CoachPad: tactical board, formation animation, drill planning, and team communication.
- Infinite Flux: lane switching, focus energy, streak scoring, upgrades, and arcade play.
